sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79903" key="pa/rwxros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάρωχρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n79903.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rather pale, sallow</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.364b</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:135" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.135</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:137" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">137</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
